name: Legacy Preferred Lending
description_short: Legacy Preferred Lending is a credit repair provider based in Houston, Texas. Rated 5.0/5 with 14 Google reviews, reflecting exceptional customer satisfaction.
description_long:
Legacy Preferred Lending is a credit repair provider serving clients in Houston, Texas. Carrying a 5.0/5.0 Google rating from 14 reviews, Legacy Preferred Lending has an exceptional reputation among consumers in the Houston area looking to repair and improve their credit scores.

Operating as a mortgage broker, Legacy Preferred Lending provides a range of services for consumers seeking credit repair solutions. Additional information about their services and processes can typically be found on their website.

When evaluating credit repair services in Houston, consumers should look for providers that dispute directly with all three credit bureaus — Equifax, Experian, and TransUnion. Key differentiators include transparency around pricing, realistic timelines for results, and whether the company offers a money-back guarantee. Legacy Preferred Lending operates in a highly regulated industry under the Credit Repair Organizations Act (CROA), which requires written contracts, a three-day cancellation window, and prohibits upfront fees before services are rendered.

Consumers in the Houston, Texas area who are considering Legacy Preferred Lending should contact the company directly to discuss their specific situation and get current pricing information. As with any credit repair provider, it is advisable to compare multiple options, verify licensing and credentials, and read recent customer reviews before making a decision.
